title: Weather Controller DataPack
description: This Is A Data Pack That Lets You Control The Weather In Survival Mode.
body:
- **[​Read The Images]**

- **This Is A Data Pack That Lets You Control The Weather In Survival Mode After Crafting A Machine, To Craft It You Will Need, two obsidian, four smooth stone, two redstone blocks, and one lightning rod. when you have these items to craft it, just throw the items on the ground.**

To Use The Weather Controller You Will Need To Be Atleast In A 2 block Distance To Use It And Select The 9th slot, 8th, or the 7th slot and sneak. to choose the weather you want. after that it's pretty simple, and when you are using the weather controller it will take a few seconds to change the weather. 

Injoy Everyone!!! :) i'm tired i need sleep.

- functions:
- weather_controller:give/recipe_items
- weather_controller:destory_all
